scan_table_check.description: A REST API Resource (Operation) must require authentication and ACL authorization. This implicitly inherits the access control specified by the REST API or requires the specification of a Resource specific ACL. This is to avoid security issues like the one documented in KB TODO.
scan_table_check.name: CodeSanity - REST API Resource Authentication
scan_table_check.resolution_details: Set the checkboxes to require authentication and ACL authorization. Leave the ACLs field blank to inherit security control from the REST API or specify an ACL specific for the REST API Resource (Operation) if a different access control is required.
scan_table_check.short_description: A REST API Resource must require authentication and ACL authorization
